chain.thought: Explanation: Looking at the pts column, the highest value that does not exceed 179.5 is 179.5, which occurs in the 2009 season.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
The condition “at most 179.5 pts” (≤ 179.5) is satisfied by multiple seasons in the table, including 2004 (0), 2005 (1), 2006 (53), 2007 (19), 2008 (176), 2009 (179.5), 2012 (37), 2013 (150), and 2014 (0). Because several years meet this criterion, there is no single unique year to return. Hence, the use of “null” appropriately reflects the non-uniqueness/indeterminacy based on the data.
